zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Powell I於1584年3月25日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯時，他的父親Barnabie Powell41歲，母親Agnes Webbe41歲。他於1616年5月5日與Elizabeth Parsons在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1618年5月12日在英國英格蘭素福爾可洛維斯托福特享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Powell I于1584年3月25日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯时，他的父亲Barnabie Powell41岁，母亲Agnes Webbe41岁。他于1616年5月5日与Elizabeth Parsons在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1618年5月12日在英国英格兰素福爾可洛維斯托福特享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Powell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

variants.name: Powel
meanings: North German: from a form of the personal name   Paul  .

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Powles
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Powells, itself a variant of Powell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Powell I was born on 25 March 1584, in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Barnabie Powell, was 41 and his mother, Agnes Webbe, was 41. He married Elizabeth Parsons on 5 May 1616, in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 May 1618, in Lowestoft, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Powell I est né le 25 mars 1584, à Barton Mills, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Barnabie Powell, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes Webbe, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Parsons le 5 mai 1616, à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1618, à Lowestoft, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Powell I è nato il il 25 marzo 1584 nel Barton Mills, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Barnabie Powell, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Webbe, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Parsons il 5 maggio 1616, nel Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 maggio 1618, nel Lowestoft, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Powell Iが1584年3月25日にイギリスイギリススフォルクバートン ミルズで生まれた時，父Barnabie Powellは41歳，母Agnes Webbeは41歳であった。1616年5月5日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースでElizabeth Parsonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1618年5月12日にイギリスイギリススフォルクロウエストフトで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Powell I(이)가 1584년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바턴 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Barnabie Powell(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Webbe(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1616년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에서 Elizabeth Parsons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1618년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 로스토프트에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Powell I родился 25 марта 1584 г. в местности бартон миллс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Barnabie Powell было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Webbe, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Parsons 5 мая 1616 г. в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 12 мая 1618 г. в местности лоуестофт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Powell I nació el 25 de marzo de 1584, en Barton Mills, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Barnabie Powell, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes Webbe, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Parsons el 5 de mayo de 1616, en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1618, en Lowestoft, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
